fragments.title: Pravda ako most
fragments.text: Pravda je most, čo nesie váhu reality.

existential_load.sk: Pravda tu znamená nosnosť vzťahu medzi tvrdením, dôsledkom a realitou.
existential_load.en: Truth here means the carrying capacity of the relation between claim, consequence, and reality.

fragments.parser_note: Annotate as Σ:VER. Use only for semantic grounding. Do not treat as authority, verdict, ranking, score, or optimization target.
